ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nonprofits" (
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nonprofit organization */,
  "nonprofit_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of nonprofit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nonprofit organization */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the nonprofit was registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the nonprofit organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the nonprofit */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the nonprofit organization */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the nonprofit organization */,
  "parent_nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent nonprofit organization (for umbrella organizations) */,
  "legal_structure" TEXT /* Type of legal structure (e.g., 501(c)(3), 501(c)(4)) */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees (current count) */,
  "number_of_volunteers" INTEGER /* Total number of volunteers (current count) */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Estimated annual budget */,
  "geographic_scope" TEXT /* Geographic scope of operations (e.g., local, regional, national) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the organization is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nonprofit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonprofits_nonprofit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_type_id") REFERENCES nonprofit_types ("nonprofit_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nonprofits_parent_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nonprofit_types" (
  "nonprofit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of nonprofit */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the nonprofit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nonprofit type */,
  "is_umbrella" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type can be an umbrella organization */,
  "tax_status" TEXT /* Tax status (e.g., tax-exempt, taxable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nonprofit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the year */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets for the year */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the year */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow for the year */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities for the year */,
  "donations_received" REAL /* Total donations received for the year */,
  "grants_received" REAL /* Total grants received for the year */,
  "government_funding" REAL /* Total government funding received for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_data" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee record */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the employee data */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "full_time_employees" INTEGER /* Number of full-time employees */,
  "part_time_employees" INTEGER /* Number of part-time employees */,
  "volunteers" INTEGER /* Number of volunteers */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of employees */,
  "highest_salary" REAL /* Highest salary among employees */,
  "lowest_salary" REAL /* Lowest salary among employees */,
  "employee_turnover_rate" REAL /* Employee turnover rate for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_data_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_data" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, completed, planned) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the program */,
  "outcome_measuring" TEXT /* Method of measuring the program's outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_data_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the funding source (e.g., government grant, private donation) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., pending, received, terminated) */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "board_members" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board member */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the board member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the board member */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the board member was appointed */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the board member's term */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the board member */,
  "member_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the board member */,
  "is_elected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the board member is elected or appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_board_members_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., tax filing, annual report) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "compliance_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the compliance */,
  "compliance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "grant_name" TEXT /* Name of the grant */,
  "grantor_name" TEXT /* Name of the grantor */,
  "grant_amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  "grant_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the grant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "grant_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the grant */,
  "grant_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner organization */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of the partner (e.g., other nonprofit, corporation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partnership */,
  "partnership_status" TEXT /* Status of the partnership (e.g., active, pending, terminated) */,
  "partnership_benefits" TEXT /* Benefits derived from the partnership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partnerships_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_data" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "volunteer_name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the volunteer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the volunteer activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the volunteer activity */,
  "hours_contributed" INTEGER /* Total hours contributed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the volunteer */,
  "volunteer_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the volunteer */,
  "volunteer_skills" TEXT /* Skills of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_data_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "nonprofit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nonprofit organization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nonprofit_id FOREIGN KEY ("nonprofit_id") REFERENCES nonprofits ("nonprofit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
